Journal Article · Angewandte Chemie International Edition, 60, 12971-12979

Single-Atom Pd Nanozyme for Ferroptosis-Boosted Mild-Temperature Photothermal Therapy

Mengyu Chang, Zhiyao Hou*, Man Wang, Chunzheng Yang, Ruifeng Wang, Fang Li, Donglian Liu, Tieli Peng, Chunxia Li*, and Jun Lin*

DOI

Abstract

A single-atom Pd nanozyme platform designed to boost ferroptosis and improve mild-temperature photothermal therapy.

Highlights

  • Uses single-atom Pd nanozyme activity to enhance therapy.
  • Combines ferroptosis with mild-temperature photothermal treatment.

Add expanded notes on nanozyme catalytic behavior, therapeutic mechanism, and preclinical model details here.

Citation

Mengyu Chang et al. Single-Atom Pd Nanozyme for Ferroptosis-Boosted Mild-Temperature Photothermal Therapy. Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2021, 60, 12971-12979.
